sourceList.title: Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - GUY [I] de Dampierre m ([1120/25]) as her second husband, HELVIDE de Baudémont, widow of HUGUES Seigneur de Montréal, daughter of ANDRE de Baudémont Seneschal de Bourgogne & his wife Agnes --- (-1165).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Helvide de Baudemont於大約1105年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯時，她的父親André de Baudemont61歲，母親Agnes31歲。她去世於1163年在法國努維勒-阿吉泰道多哈帕格-吉方泰享年59歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Helvide
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Helvide de Baudemont was born about 1105, in Île-de-France, France, her father, André de Baudemont, was 61 and her mother, Agnes, was 31. She died in 1163, in Champagne-et-Fontaine, Dordogne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Helvide de Baudemont est née environ 1105, à Île-de-France, France, son père, André de Baudemont, avait 61 ans et sa mère, Agnes, avait 31 ans. Elle est décédée en 1163, à Champagne-et-Fontaine, Dordogne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Helvide de Baudemont um 1105 in Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater André de Baudemont 61 und ihre Mutter Agnes 31. Sie starb 1163 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Champagne-et-Fontaine, Dordogne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Helvide de Baudemont è nata il circa 1105 nel Île-de-France, Francia, sua padre, André de Baudemont, aveva 61 anni e sua madre, Agnes, aveva 31 anni. Morì nel 1163, nel Champagne-et-Fontaine, Dordogne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Helvide de Baudemontが約1105年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスで生まれた時，父André de Baudemontは61歳，母Agnesは31歳であった。彼女は1163年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインドールドグンチャンプアグネ-エト-フォンティアインで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Helvide de Baudemont(이)가 대략 1105년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 André de Baudemont(은)는 61세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1163년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 도르도그니 챔파그니-트-폰테인에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Helvide de Baudemont nasceu aproximadamente 1105, em Île-de-France, França, seu pai, André de Baudemont, tinha 61 anos e sua mãe, Agnes, tinha 31 anos. Ela faleceu em 1163, em Champagne-et-Fontaine, Dordogne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Helvide de Baudemont родилась около 1105 г. в местности iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени André de Baudemont было 61 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes, 31. Она умерла в 1163 г. в местности чампагне-ет-фонтеин, дордогн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Helvide de Baudemont nació aproximadamente 1105, en Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, André de Baudemont, tenía 61 años y su mamá, Agnes, tenía 31 años. Murió en 1163, en Champagne-et-Fontaine, Dordogne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, a la edad de 59 años.
